summary_test_cases.docstring: Create a new SQLite connection with WAL mode and extensions loaded.
summary_test_cases.source:
def get_connection(db_path=None):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(str(db_path))
    conn.execute('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
    return conn

summary_test_cases.signature: def parse_file(content: str, filename: str, language: str) -> list[Symbol]
summary_test_cases.source:
def parse_file(content, filename, language):
    spec = get_spec(language)
    parser = get_parser(spec.ts_language)
    tree = parser.parse(content.encode())
    symbols = []
    _walk_tree(tree.root_node, spec, symbols)
    return symbols
